text.title: ADA Title II Compliance 2026 Failure Modes
text.summary: 3 antipatterns observed when applying ada-title-ii-compliance-2026; each pairs symptom + root cause + concrete fix.

antipattern.symptom: Report scores against WCAG 2.2 AA assuming higher target satisfies the rule.
antipattern.root-cause: Audit team applied current 'best practice' instead of the rule text.
antipattern.fix: Audit MUST score against 2.1 AA explicitly; report MAY note additional 2.2 AA progress as bonus.

antipattern.symptom: Embedded video provider + payment widget excluded from scope; user complaint reaches OCR/DOJ.
antipattern.root-cause: Assumption that vendor-provided components are out of scope.
antipattern.fix: Vendor contracts MUST require WCAG 2.1 AA; embedded surfaces in audit scope.

antipattern.symptom: Conformance memo signed by CIO with no Stage 4 (screen reader) evidence.
antipattern.root-cause: Short timeline pressure → attestation without audit.
antipattern.fix: Reject report without Stage 1-5 audit evidence; budget for audit before deadline.
